/usr/bin/c++  -pthread -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/fluid.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/fluid.dir/fluid.cxx.o "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/CodeEditor.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/StyleParse.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/Fd_Snap_Action.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/Fl_Function_Type.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/Fl_Grid_Type.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/Fl_Group_Type.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/Fl_Menu_Type.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/Fl_Type.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/Fl_Widget_Type.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/Fl_Window_Type.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/Fl_Button_Type.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/Fluid_Image.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/about_panel.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/align_widget.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/settings_panel.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/autodoc.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/code.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/custom_widgets.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/factory.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/file.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/fluid_filename.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/function_panel.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/mergeback.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/pixmaps.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/shell_command.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/codeview_panel.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/template_panel.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/undo.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/widget_browser.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/widget_panel.cxx.o" "CMakeFiles/fluid-lib.dir/ExternalCodeEditor_UNIX.cxx.o" -o ../bin/fluid   -L/home/artem/cpp_sem1/build/_deps/fltk-build/src/../lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/artem/cpp_sem1/build/_deps/fltk-build/src/../lib: ../lib/libfltk_images.a ../lib/libfltk.a /usr/lib64/libdl.a /usr/lib64/libX11.so ../lib/libfltk_png.a ../lib/libfltk_z.a ../lib/libfltk_jpeg.a
